title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people recycling bottles. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A father and his daughter are recycling bottles at a recycling centre. The girl is putting a plastic bottle into a recycling container while her father is holding a bag. There are several coloured containers and a bicycle nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people learning to sail. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: Two teenagers are learning to sail on a small boat on a lake. They are wearing life jackets and an instructor is showing them how to hold a rope. There is calm water, another boat and hills in the background.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
